events.label: wind_noise_microphone
events.description: Low-frequency wind noise captured by microphone, likely from street-level turbulence.
events.source_hint: Wind blowing past buildings and street, picked up by microphone.

events.label: wind
events.description: Wind blowing through street, creating a consistent ambient breeze.
events.source_hint: Wind moving through urban environment, possibly around buildings and trees.
